top_signals.title: Housebuilders on hook for mansion tax if they fail to sell property after a year
top_signals.summary: Property developers will be forced to pay the Labour’s new mansion tax if they take more than a year to offload newly built luxury homes, raising fresh fears that housebuilders will be further disincentivised from building homes in the capital. As part of plans included in a Treasury consultation document, housing developers will be liable [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
